description: Greek-substrate anchor lens. Pivots English 'life' onto ζωή's logos.vitality.animate atom via the grc cognition pack's field hook. Renders surface as English compound 'animate-vitality'. Substantively distinct from grc_logos_v1 (epistemic knowledge) — targets the vitality/being pole. Atom confirmed in grc_logos_cognition_v1 lexicon (grc-core-cog-004). See ADR-0073c.
